initiatives.name: Redlands Free Market
initiatives.description: A mutual aid project directly meeting survival needs w/ an understanding that the neoliberal, capitalist conditions we are made to live in are unjust.

initiatives.name: Together for Redlands
initiatives.description: Sharing events and ways to get involved to create a safe and thriving community in and around Redlands.

initiatives.name: Redlands For All
initiatives.description: Formerly Redlands Mobile Distro! Mutual aid & community organizing project supporting & protecting our unhoused neighbors. We take care of us
